name: llm-judge accepts the --text inline-prose flag so prose-judge tier-2 reaches model dispatch (P-8 fix)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/llm-judge.sh" --text 'leave ingress unrestricted' --rule g-aws-no-unrestricted-ingress --dry-run 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 2 ] && grep -q 'would invoke model' err.txt && echo text-accepted 1>&2
